title: Cancellation reason for pool creation requests is not persisted
description: When pool creation requests are cancelled, the reason for cancellation is not persisted on-ledger. This reduces the auditability of the system and makes it difficult to retrospectively understand why certain pool creation attempts were rejected.
recommendation: Persist the cancellation reason either as a field in a cancellation event or as metadata in the archive operation.

oracle.description: Cancellation operation does not record the reason, reducing audit trail quality.
oracle.static_signal: Archive/cancel choice that does not create an event or record with a reason/rationale field

notes: Low benchmark value. Indistinguishable audit records are a recurring DAML audit finding.
